metadata.title: ROSClaw - Software-Defined Embodied AI
metadata.description: The AUTOSAR + Android for the robotics industry. ROSClaw unifies hardware morphologies, algorithms, and data formats into a single, scalable Operating System.

hero.title: Software-Defined Embodied AI.
hero.subtitle: The AUTOSAR + Android for the robotics industry. ROSClaw unifies hardware morphologies, algorithms, and data formats into a single, scalable Operating System.

embodiment.title: Write Once. Embody Anywhere.
embodiment.subtitle: The same agent logic runs seamlessly across heterogeneous robot morphologies.

specs.humanoid: 20 DOF • e-URDF Semantic Mapping • VLA Policy

features.title: One Unified Standard. Zero Fragmentation.
features.subtitle: Breaking down silos. Establishing a unified embodied AI standard.

cross_embodiment.title: Cross-Embodiment
cross_embodiment.subtitle: Semantic-HAL
cross_embodiment.description: Powered by e-URDF. Map high-level semantic intents to local hardware dynamics automatically. Your code runs seamlessly on wheeled, quadruped, or bipedal robots without modification.

cross_tool.title: Cross-Tool
cross_tool.subtitle: Embodied MCP
cross_tool.description: Native Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration. Every camera, LIDAR, and robotic arm API is instantly translated into standard JSON schemas for LLMs to consume and command.

cross_algorithm.title: Cross-Algorithm
cross_algorithm.subtitle: Brain-Cerebellum Router
cross_algorithm.description: The ultimate bus linking 1Hz LLM reasoning with 100Hz+ VLA control policies. Ensure soft-real-time execution with dynamic authority handovers.

cross_format.title: Cross-Format
cross_format.subtitle: Unified Trajectory Engine
cross_format.description: OS-level data interception. ROSClaw automatically time-syncs and packages heterogeneous sensor data and LLM CoT into standard RLDS/HDF5 formats. Ready for Open X-Embodiment training.

installation.title: One Command to Rule Your Robot
installation.subtitle: Zero configuration. Native ROS 2 compatibility. Ready in 60 seconds.
installation.description: The era of hardcoded state machines is over. Install the ROSClaw kernel and let the LLM take the wheel.

cta.title: Join the OS Revolution for Robotics.
cta.description: Stop building custom state machines. Start building intelligent agents.

footer.copyright: © 2026 ROSClaw. Defined by the Open Source Community.
